title: Grape and Tomato Frittata
description: A simple Italian-style omelette filled with fresh grapes and tomatoes. Perfect for brunch or breakfast.
instructions: Cut the fluffy portuguese bread into small pieces and toast until crispy.
In a large bowl, whisk the eggs and season with salt and pepper.
Heat a small non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add the toasted bread to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the halved grapes and tomatoes to the pan and cook for another 2-3 minutes.
Pour the whisked eggs over the bread, grapes, and tomatoes.
Transfer the pan to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes or until the eggs are set.
Remove the pan from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Use a spatula to loosen the edges of the frittata and slide it onto a plate.
